RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: Plaintiff Joseph Tucker'S Motion For Sanctions is Denied. Apart from the fact that Code of Civil Procedure 128.5 is not applicable to any case filed in the last sixteen years, plaintiff has not shown that Mr. Mejia's motion is frivolous, filed in bad faith or with any intention to mislead the court.
